label: Trait requirement
description: A trait and optional degree pair used to match a pawn's traits. Loaded from keyed child elements via LoadDataFromXmlCustom.

def.label: Trait
def.description: TraitDef that must be present (or absent) on the pawn for this requirement to match.

degree.label: Degree
degree.description: Specific trait degree that must match. When absent, any degree of the trait satisfies the requirement.
